pageContext.name: Padmé Amidala 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Star Wars™ Chibi® Coin in Memory of this Courageous and Hopeful Leader  Our Star Wars™ Chibi® Coin Collection continues with the courageous leader, and Queen of Naboo™, Padme Amidala™.   This twelfth coin in the Star Wars series is made from 1oz of pure silver which has been shaped and colored to represent Queen Amidala. It is placed inside a specially designed case, molded to the coin's shape, for protection.   The large window in the box allows the coin to be easily displayed and includes confirmation of the coin's unique number in the limited-edition mintage of 2,000. This majestic coin for the mother to Luke and Leia is bound to be sought after. Command yours now!
